name: FARADAY FUTURE INTELLIGENT ELECTRIC INC.
business: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. designs, engineers, and develops intelligent, connected electric vehicles under the FF and FX brands, along with related AI-enabled technologies. The company also holds a majority interest in AIxCrypto Holdings, Inc., which focuses on blockchain infrastructure and digital asset initiatives.

exposures.sentence: The Company's primary business activities center on its AIEV platform, including the FF and FX vehicle series.
During 2025, the Company began evaluating a robotics initiative as a potential extension of its broader embodied AI and intelligent mobility strategy.

The Company also holds a majority interest in AIxCrypto Holdings, Inc. (AIXC), an independent public company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol AIXC, whose business is focused on embodied AI infrastructure and blockchain infrastructure.
In addition, AIXC holds a legacy biologics asset originating from prior operations, consisting of an early-stage oncology program.

The Company's I.A.I. technology is designed to support high-performance computing, high-speed internet connectivity, OTA update capabilities, an open ecosystem for third-party application integration, and an autonomous driving-ready system.

catalysts.event: First FX Super One pre-production vehicle rolled off the line at FF aiFactory California
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, the first FX Super One pre-production vehicle rolled off the line at the Company's FF aiFactory California manufacturing facility.

catalysts.event: FX Super One initial deliveries expected to begin
catalysts.sentence: The Company has outlined a phased delivery strategy for the FX Super One in the United States, with initial deliveries expected to begin in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Establishment of FF AI-Robotics Inc. and launch of three robotics product lines with planned initial deliveries
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, the Company established FF AI-Robotics Inc. and launched three robotics product lines, FF Futurist, FF Master and FX Aegis, and disclosed that sales and pre-orders had opened, more than 1,200 non-binding and non-refundable B2B deposits had been received, and initial deliveries were planned for late February 2026.

catalysts.event: Incorporation of Future AIHER AI Hybrid Extended-Range Electric Powertrain System Inc.
catalysts.sentence: In March 2025, Future AIHER AI Hybrid Extended-Range Electric Powertrain System Inc. was incorporated in the State of Delaware as a subsidiary of the Company.
